rules.title: Network IOC Detection [09067f7a7a4f]
rules.content:
title: CDB SENTINEL APEX - Network Threat Intel [09067f7a7a4f]
id: cdb-net-09067f7a7a4f
status: production
description: >
    Auto-generated detection rule for 29 malicious IPs and 40 malicious domains
    from CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX threat intelligence feeds.

date: 2026-04-25
modified: 2026-04-25
tags:
    - attack.command_and_control
    - attack.t1071
    - attack.t1090
logsource:
    category: firewall
    product: any
detection:
    selection:
        DestinationIp:
            - '1.53.114.181'
            - '104.28.160.197'

            - '1.26.0.138'

            - '1.26.0.134'

            - 'rockwellautomation.com'
            - 'www.xiongmaitech.com'
            - 'yadea.com'
            - 'getsession.org'
            - 'www.torproject.org'
            - 'x.com'

            - 'index.crates.io'

            - 'www.silobreaker.com'

            - 'odaracani.online'

            - 'www.carlsonsw.com'

rules.title: Phishing Detection [09067f7a7a4f]
rules.content:
title: CDB SENTINEL APEX - Phishing Sender Detection [09067f7a7a4f]
id: cdb-phish-09067f7a7a4f
status: production
description: Detects emails from known malicious senders
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX v51
date: 2026-04-25
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
    - attack.t1566
logsource:
    category: email
    product: any
detection:
    selection:
        SenderAddress:
            - 'CybersecurityReports@nsa.gov'
            - 'EnergySRMA@hq.doe.gov'
            - 'PSIRT@rockwellautomation.com'
            - 'contact@cisa.dhs.gov'
            - 'bivash@cyberdudebivash.com'
            - 'ncscinfoleg@ncsc.gov.uk'
            - 'chocapikk@leakix.net'
            - 'bcoles@gmail.com'
            - 'theLightCosine@metasploit.com'
    condition: selection
level: high
falsepositives:
    - Spoofed sender addresses
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
